ablations.component_removed_or_modified: Replace the structure-aware co-evolution mechanism with a single-population variant.
ablations.controlled_conditions: Keep encoding, evaluation budget, case studies, and parameter reporting fixed except for the mechanism under test.
ablations.expected_result_pattern: Conditional plan only: C2 would be supported only if this variant clarifies the mechanism's role under the declared metrics.
ablations.failure_pattern: If the ablation cannot isolate the mechanism, C2 should be narrowed or redesigned.
ablations.interpretation_rule: Interpret only the planned comparison structure until real empirical data exist.
ablations.reviewer_risk: Reviewer may question C2 if the ablation changes more than the claimed mechanism.
limitations: No empirical effect size is claimed.

assumptions: C2 is treated as the algorithmic contribution in the demo fixture.
